notes.type_correctness: AnalyticsResponse type is defined identically in server/types.ts and client/src/types.ts. All field names are consistent (camelCase for KPI fields, snake_case for timeline date fields). The commandPerformance array correctly includes a successRate computed field that merges the DB successCount with totalRuns.
notes.pattern_adherence: getAnalytics follows the existing synchronous better-sqlite3 pattern (no async). All SUM aggregations use COALESCE. The duration histogram uses fixed bucket ordering in JS after the SQL query rather than relying on GROUP BY order. fillDateSeries zero-fills date gaps as required.
notes.test_coverage: All 6 analytics test cases pass including empty DB, single job, date gap zero-fill, delta calculation, NULL cost handling, and histogram bucket ordering. AnalyticsPage uses AbortController for stale fetch cancellation.
notes.security: GET /api/analytics validates period is one of the allowed enum values and requires from/to for custom period. Query parameters are passed to SQLite via prepared statement parameters — no SQL injection risk. No sensitive data exposed.
notes.architectural_alignment: Analytics route is correctly placed after /api/stats in index.ts. Recharts is used with ResponsiveContainer width=100% throughout. Color constants are centralized in lib/dracula-colors.ts. AnalyticsPage owns all state and passes typed props to chart components, which are purely presentational.
